evaluators.name: Newest PC Patch Notes (Last 14 Days) Reading List Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved the newest PC patch notes article from the last 14 days to their reading list.

evaluators.name: Weekly Patch Notes & Esports Newsletter (NA) Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether newsletter preferences are set to weekly, only Patch Notes and Esports topics enabled, region North America, and subscribed.

evaluators.name: Top 3 Most-Viewed 2025 Esports Tournament Favorites Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user favorited the three most-viewed 2025 esports tournament announcement articles.

evaluators.name: Higher-Version Balance Patch Comment Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user posted a new comment on the higher-version article among the two newest balance patch notes.

evaluators.name: Server Status & Maintenance Only Notifications Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether only server status and maintenance categories are enabled, in-site on, email and mobile push off, with do-not-disturb from 22:00 to 08:00.

evaluators.name: Roadmap Reading Collection Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether a 'Roadmap Reading' collection contains the three oldest roadmap dev blogs from the last six months.

evaluators.name: Earliest EU Shadow Siege Announcement Bookmark Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the earliest European Shadow Siege update announcement is bookmarked in either favorites or reading list.

evaluators.name: New Players Collection Beginner Guides Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether a 'New Players' collection contains the two highest-rated beginner/new-player guides with 10–30 minute reading time.
